# Product Requirements Document: [Project Name]

## 1. Problem Statement

What problem does this project solve? Who experiences this problem?

> One paragraph describing the core pain point.

## 2. Vision

What does the world look like when this project succeeds?

> One paragraph describing the desired end state.

## 3. Users & Personas

| Persona | Description | Primary Need |
|---------|-------------|-------------|
| Persona 1 | Who they are | What they need |
| Persona 2 | Who they are | What they need |

## 4. User Scenarios

### Scenario 1: [Name]

**As a** [persona], **I want to** [action], **so that** [outcome].

**Flow:**
1. User does X
2. System responds with Y
3. User sees Z

### Scenario 2: [Name]

**As a** [persona], **I want to** [action], **so that** [outcome].

## 5. Capabilities

### Must Have (P0)

- [ ] Capability 1 — Description
- [ ] Capability 2 — Description

### Should Have (P1)

- [ ] Capability 3 — Description

### Nice to Have (P2)

- [ ] Capability 4 — Description

## 6. Constraints

### Technical Constraints

| Constraint | Value | Rationale |
|-----------|-------|-----------|
| Language | Python 3.12+ | Team expertise |
| Package manager | uv | Speed, reproducibility |
| Example constraint | Example value | Why |

### Non-Functional Requirements

| Requirement | Target | Measurement |
|------------|--------|-------------|
| Response time | < X ms | p95 latency |
| Availability | X% | Monthly uptime |
| Example | Value | How measured |

### Budget / Resource Constraints

- Hardware: [describe limits]
- Cost: [monthly/annual budget]
- Team: [team size and availability]

## 7. Out of Scope

Explicitly list what this project does NOT do:

- Not doing X
- Not doing Y
- Not doing Z

## 8. Success Metrics

| Metric | Target | Measurement Method |
|--------|--------|-------------------|
| Metric 1 | Target value | How to measure |
| Metric 2 | Target value | How to measure |

## 9. Risks & Unknowns

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|-----------|--------|------------|
| Risk 1 | High/Med/Low | High/Med/Low | What to do |

### Open Questions

- [ ] Question 1 — needs spike to answer
- [ ] Question 2 — ask domain expert

## 10. Timeline (Optional)

| Phase | Duration | Deliverable |
|-------|----------|-------------|
| Phase 1: Discovery | X weeks | PRD + DDD artifacts |
| Phase 2: Architecture | X weeks | Architecture doc + spikes |
| Phase 3: Implementation | X weeks | MVP |
| Phase 4: Validation | X weeks | Testing + refinement |
